outputs: sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
warnings: Do not correct grammar in terminal captures. The terminal is allowed to make mistakes when it is afraid of being too specific.
Staff who experience nostalgia while reading a terminal output should record the sensation under routine environmental discomfort, not memory recall.
When a command returns silence, the silence should be treated as a complete sentence for the purpose of audit review.
